title: Mission to Kejim
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Mission |prev=[[Mission to Tatooine (Kyle Katarn)|Mission to Tatooine]]{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}} |conc= |next=[[Battle of Artus Prime]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' |image=[[File:Jan_ors.jpg]] |name=Mission to Kejim |conflict=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Empire Reborn campaign]] |objective=Investigate [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire Reborn]] transmissions on Kejim |date=[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Kejim]] |result=Discovery of lab to test [[Artusian crystal]]s |side1=Empire Reborn |side2=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kyle Katarn]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*152 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *25 [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] *6 [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] *2 [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-O Interrogators]] *5 [[Sentry droid/Legends|Sentries]] |ppl2=*2 [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] **[[Kyle Katarn]] **[[Jan Ors]] *1 [[Courier/Legends|Light courier]] **''[[Raven's Claw]]'' |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=*Many Imperial officers *Many stormtroopers *Many Viper Probe droids *5 sentries |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Ah, Admiral Fyyar. How go our experiments?'''"
"'''As of this moment, they're not going at all.|[[Desann]] and [[Galak Fyyar]]|audio=KejimExperiments.flac|}} During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] went on a '''mission''' to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kejim]] at the behest of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Your objectives, however, remain the same: Find out what you can, Clear out any Remnant forces you encounter, and may the Force be with you.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]|}} [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sources had detected a suspicious transmission containing keywords such as "[[Reborn]]" and "[[Valley of the Jedi]]" from a supposedly abandoned [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Kejim Outpost|base]] on [[Kejim]]. The transmission was believed to be for [[Galak Fyyar]], a scientist working with the [[Imperial Remnant]]. [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the New Republic, sent the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] on a covert mission to investigate the base. ==The mission== After landing, Katarn and Ors cleared out Imperial forces guarding the area outside the base. Katarn then activated a [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turret]] and used it to blast the sealed entrance open. Upon successfully infiltrating the base, Ors remained in the control room to search the computer database for useful information. In the meantime, Katarn explored all three sections of the base and wiped out all the Imperial forces he encountered. At one point, when he called Ors over to another section to help him crack a code, she was attacked and pinned down by Imperial forces until he returned in the nick of time to save her. Katarn found three different Imperial codes and used them to unlock another door leading further into the base. While Ors prepared the [[Raven's Claw]] for takeoff, Katarn continued to explore the base and destroy all Imperial forces he came across. Katarn eventually discovered that the base was being used by the [[Empire Reborn]] as a laboratory dedicated to testing [[Artusian crystal]]s—[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] objects. By the time the two mercenaries left the planet, they had dealt significant damage to the Imperial Remnant operation on Kejim. ==Aftermath== Upon returning to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Katarn and Ors reported their findings to Mon Mothma, who continued to engage their services to trace the source of the crystals on [[Artus Prime]]. In the meantime, a security camera on Kejim had captured an image of Katarn, which was forwarded to Galak Fyyar. Fyyar, in turn, reported the incident on Kejim to [[Desann]], who remarked that the "setback" they had faced could be the key to solving their problems. ==Behind the scenes== The mission appears in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''. If a player overhears one of the conversations between the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on Artus Prime, a stormtrooper mentions that he arrived from Kejim, and is being transferred to [[Cairn Installation]]. The final appearance of the "traveling stormtrooper" is at Cairn Installation, where he mentions to a comrade that he came from Artus Prime. In that dialogue it is mentioned that a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] (Kyle Katarn) killed nearly everyone in Kejim. Since Katarn was not yet reconnected with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] or in possession of a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] at that point, this is most likely an in-game rumor in motion amongst the stormtroopers or just a continuity error. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GamerCite|9|State of the Arts}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Reborn}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a Kejim |fi=Tehtävä Kejimiin }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kejim, mission to}} [[Category:Battles in the Sertar sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Empire Reborn campaign]]
